why_winner: B leads with the exact reframe the tracker recommends (an arguable indictment, not a scene), carries every number from the plan, and folds the tactical setup in without losing pace. It is the 'taking sides' shape that has performed best for this audience.

runner_up_notes.C: The numbered 3-step Claude Code setup is the clearest actionable block of the three. B compresses it into prose; if B ever feels flat, graft C's numbered list in.
runner_up_notes.A: The 'ten minutes' personal proof point is nice but invents a specific not present in the raw idea; correctly excluded from the winner.
